state.summary: Strong interest and positive feedback, but no willingness to preorder at the stated price was validated.

negative_signals: Zero preorder conversions at stated price
likely_issues: Price too high relative to perceived value
Too much commitment required too early
Landing page may create interest without enough trust or urgency
Value proposition may be appealing but insufficiently concrete for purchase

recommended_next_experiment.name: pricing_and_commitment_test
recommended_next_experiment.summary: Test whether lower purchase friction improves conversion versus the original preorder offer.
design: Keep the same audience and core positioning
Use one variant with the original preorder price
Use another variant with a lower-friction commitment such as a small refundable deposit
recommended_next_experiment.why: The existing experiment already validated attention, so the next uncertainty to resolve is willingness to commit under different pricing and commitment structures.

decision_rule.if_lower_friction_converts: Demand likely exists, but the original price or commitment level was too aggressive.
decision_rule.if_nothing_converts: Re-examine the core value proposition, audience fit, or problem importance.
